perturbation_note: U=1 marks documented load shock events (heat waves, cold snaps, N-1 contingency events).
fragility_global_note: Grid data quality is generally high. Main fragility sources: (1) cross-border flow data is post-hoc reconciled and can be revised; (2) reserve margin definition varies by TSO; (3) reported vs realised reserve can differ. All three issues require version-locked data downloads with SHA-256 verification.

columns.fragility_note: Frequency deviation requires sub-hourly resolution (15-min or better). Hourly averaging masks fast transients.
columns.manipulability_note: TSOs can provide frequency support through FACTS devices; apparent deviation may be suppressed.
columns.description: Normalised frequency deviation from nominal (50/60 Hz). Invert: O = 1 − deviation_norm. Low deviation = high organisational stability.

columns.fragility_note: Reserve margin definition: (installed_capacity − peak_demand) / peak_demand. TSO-specific capacity counting rules vary.
columns.manipulability_note: Availability declarations are TSO-controlled; forced outages undermine reported reserve.
columns.description: Available reserve margin (fraction of peak demand). Higher = more resilient.

columns.fragility_note: Cross-border flows require multi-TSO data synchronisation. Congestion management creates artefacts.
columns.manipulability_note: Market coupling prices and curtailment orders affect apparent flow coherence.
columns.description: Rolling correlation between interconnected zone flows (cross-border integration index).

columns.fragility_note: DR participation data is partially confidential. Proxy: ratio of actual vs forecast demand during peak events.
columns.manipulability_note: TSOs and aggregators control DR activation; data may not be publicly available at required granularity.
columns.description: Cumulative demand response participation index (symbolic stock: accumulated smart-grid response memory).

columns.fragility_note: Total load is the most reliable ENTSO-E series. 15-min resolution available.
columns.manipulability_note: Large industrial consumers can shift load; does not affect aggregate materially.
columns.description: Total electricity consumption (normalised). Environmental demand on the grid system.

data_preparation_notes: Recommended resolution: 15-minute or hourly. Use UTC timestamps.
Download from ENTSO-E Transparency Platform via SFTP or REST API.
crossborder_coherence: compute as rolling 24h Pearson correlation between two border-zone net positions.
Annotate N-1 events, extreme weather days, and planned maintenance in U column.
Minimum 168 hourly rows (1 week). Recommended: 8760 (1 year) for seasonal coverage.
Verify SHA-256 of downloaded files and record in manifest.json.
